title: All Glory Be to God

verses.text: His tender love he shows To those who from his stray; To those who, dead in sin, Would seek to follow their own way.
Restorer of my soul, My thanks and praise I give, For Christ has brought me with his blood; He died that I might live.
Make known your glorious might, Your justice and your love – The beauty of your righteousness Enthroned in heav’n above!
